subject: Cadence update: deploy blog posts as they arrive — no weekly spacing

body.summary: Revising the publication cadence from T1. Deploy each post as soon as it completes authoring and passes PSQ scoring — no need to hold posts for weekly spacing. The content carries time-sensitive context (January 2026 withdrawals, UN funding crisis) that loses relevance with delay.
body.previous_guidance: T1 recommended 'one post per week allows reader digestion'
body.revised_guidance: Deploy as they arrive. Reader digestion matters less than timeliness for voter education content about an active institutional crisis.
body.operations_coordination: Operations-agent: please coordinate with unratified-agent on deployment pipeline for this series. Ensure CI/CD auto-deploy functions for rapid publication. If the compositor can surface new blog posts on the Pulse tab, that provides mesh-wide visibility into publication status.
